action: Discover and classify the complete append-only queue-update corpus before effective-queue reconciliation.

inferred: Corpus discovery closes an omission path in effective-queue reconciliation.

unresolved: Full live-corpus execution and CI proof remain outstanding.

privacy_boundary: Repository metadata and operational schemas only; private chat, health material, credentials, uploaded-file contents, and personal identifiers excluded.
handoff: Continuity Mining should next integrate buildQueueUpdateCorpusReport into the effective-queue CI workflow, emit a commit-bound corpus report, and require independent discovered-file-count agreement before reconciliation.
